moduleDescription:
Nim OID support. An OID is a global ID that consists of a timestamp, a unique counter and a random value. This combination should suffice to produce a globally distributed unique ID.

This implementation calls initRand() for the first call of genOid.

entries.code:
proc `==`(oid1: Oid; oid2: Oid): bool {.inline, raises: [], tags: [],
                                        forbids: [].}

entries.name: hash
entries.code: proc hash(oid: Oid): Hash {.raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
entries.description: Generates the hash of an OID for use in hashtables.

entries.name: parseOid
entries.code: proc parseOid(str: cstring): Oid {.raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}

entries.description: Converts an OID to a string.

entries.name: generatedTime
entries.code: proc generatedTime(oid: Oid): Time {.raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
entries.description: Returns the generated timestamp of the OID.
